facilities.title: Empowering Minds, Enriching Souls: The Doon Way to Holistic Excellence
facilities.description: At Doon International School, education is not memorization-it is transformation. Our curriculum blends intellectual rigor, cultural depth, and experiential learning to nurture every child's potential. With innovation, values, and creativity at its core, we prepare learners to excel in academics and life.

facilities.title: 🌱 ELCP - Experiential Learning Curriculum Plan
facilities.description:
Our Experiential Learning Curriculum Plan (ELCP) ensures that every chapter is paired with a real-world activity to make knowledge tangible.
  • Children spinning during games experience centripetal force before studying it in Physics.
  • Measuring the school garden during plantation drives becomes a live lesson in area and perimeter.
  • A mock market setup teaches profit, loss, budgeting, and communication.
Through subject integration, field visits, projects, and thematic activities, students gain a real feel of application, making learning joyful, relevant, and lasting.

facilities.title: 📊 Weekly Assessments & Individual Remediation
facilities.description: Learning is continuously monitored through weekly assessments. Based on classroom interaction and performance, additional remediation classes are scheduled to strengthen weak areas. Every lesson is designed with pre-set academic standards, ensuring that children across all levels are engaged, challenged, and supported.

facilities.title: 🧠 Vedic Mathematics
facilities.description: Our Vedic Maths program, guided by the Principal Sir, enhances mental agility, speed, and accuracy. Students develop a love for numbers and master techniques for quick calculation-an invaluable skill for academics and competitive exams.

facilities.title: 🕉️ Spiritual Classes
facilities.description: Rooted in Indian values, our spiritual sessions nurture mindfulness, gratitude, and ethical grounding. Through stories, chants, and reflection, students learn to balance ambition with humility and inner peace.

facilities.title: 🗣️ Spoken English & Personality Development
facilities.description: Confidence in communication is cultivated through debates, role plays, and public speaking. Students gain fluency in English and develop essential life skills-leadership, etiquette, and emotional intelligence-that prepare them for global platforms.

facilities.title: 🌍 Foreign Language Exposure
facilities.description: We offer foreign language programs such as French and German to broaden horizons. Students gain linguistic skills and cultural awareness, equipping them for international opportunities.

facilities.title: 🎨 Fine Arts Integration
facilities.description:
At Doon, fine arts are integral to academics.
  • Through dance, learners explore the science of body posture and understand mathematical sequencing in steps.
  • In visual art, they identify and apply shapes, symmetry, and geometry.
  • Through music, they develop coordination and grasp the scientific principles of sound.
Fine arts become a medium of personality development, confidence-building, and interdisciplinary learning.

facilities.title: 🔬 Experiential Learning & Innovation Platforms
facilities.description:
Our curriculum emphasizes learning by doing through projects, fieldwork, exhibitions, and real-life applications. Robotics, science labs, social studies surveys, and thematic showcases make knowledge meaningful and collaborative.

We proudly host IGNITE@DIS, our flagship Science and Innovation Club, where students explore STEM, technology, and design thinking through hands-on challenges, coding, model-making, and research. These platforms foster curiosity, creativity, and a spirit of invention.

facilities.title: Final Tagline
facilities.description:
From Vedic Maths to robotics, spoken English to spiritual wisdom -
Doon International School nurtures every learner with precision, passion, and purpose.
Here, every talent finds its path, every dream finds its wings.
